message:
feat(beads): add 72 comprehensive beads for NTM v2.0 transformation

This commit adds 72 new beads capturing the complete implementation plan
for transforming NTM from a session manager into an intelligent orchestrator.

## Summary of New Beads

### New Features (6)
- ntm-rmbk: ntm init Command (project initialization)
- ntm-r5b6: ntm serve Command (HTTP server + WebSocket streaming)
- ntm-55zg: ntm approve Command (approval workflow)
- ntm-i5nz: Unified Messenger (Agent Mail + BD deduplication)
- ntm-3xrj: Design Invariants Enforcement (6 invariants)
- ntm-crjq: Success Metrics Tracking

### Granular Implementation Tasks (21)
Agent Mail Macros:
- ntm-12vh: macro_start_session wrapper
- ntm-bazg: macro_prepare_thread wrapper
- ntm-5rge: macro_contact_handshake wrapper

File Reservation:
- ntm-21dx: ntm reserve command
- ntm-7o58: ntm release command
- ntm-iyqu: ntm reservations command

Destructive Command Protection:
- ntm-j0ax: PATH wrappers for git
- ntm-567t: ntm safety commands
- ntm-s605: ntm guards commands

Session Coordinator:
- ntm-hecn: ntm coordinator commands
- ntm-o1fq: Score-based work assignment
- ntm-3lf0: Quality Monitor subsystem

BV Mega-Commands:
- ntm-6q7g: BV triage caching layer
- ntm-v8b8: ntm work commands
- ntm-hm2n: Additional BV adapters

CM/BD Integration:
- ntm-cvws: CM adapter and client
- ntm-xpje: ntm memory commands
- ntm-ygld: ntm beads commands

Test Strategy:
- ntm-alxo: Fake tools for testing
- ntm-qfzj: Daemon chaos tests
- ntm-3s2g: E2E session lifecycle tests

### Cross-Cutting Features (from previous session)
- ntm-014q: Policy Engine
- ntm-gy4o: Approval Workflow Engine
- ntm-y700: ContextPack Builder
- ntm-twff: Human Notification Routing
- ntm-mzsq: Configuration Management
- ntm-pryz: Agent Capability Profiles

## Bead Statistics
- Total: 675 issues
- Open: 143
- Blocked: 127
- Ready: 16

All beads include:
- Detailed implementation guidance
- Code examples and interfaces
- Proper dependency chains
- Acceptance criteria
